headline: Henry Schein Board Reset Raises Questions For Valuation And Capital Decisions
summary: Henry Schein (NasdaqGS:HSIC) announced significant board changes, including the planned retirement of long serving directors. Stanley M. Bergman, a director for 44 years, is set to retire from the board. The company plans to reduce its board size by roughly one third as part of this refresh. Henry Schein, a global provider of health care products and services to dental and medical professionals, sits at the intersection of clinical supplies and practice management solutions. For investors...
